heroHeadline: Trump Ousts Senior Generals to Consolidate Iran War Command
heroSubtitle: Trump reshuffles top U.S. military leadership in a sweeping command shake-up mid-conflict, asserting civilian control over Operation Epic Fury on Day 37.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
